## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Hypergrowth and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and LinkedIn post performance.](https://fathom.video/share/T3EBgMGKBvQAu9jWamjm-yiG8KBXVZiz?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Recent LinkedIn post underperformed (33 reactions, 2k views) vs previous post; team to experiment with posting time, image use, and content style](https://fathom.video/share/T3EBgMGKBvQAu9jWamjm-yiG8KBXVZiz?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - ["10 years of learning as a growth advisor" post in progress; considering splitting into series](https://fathom.video/share/T3EBgMGKBvQAu9jWamjm-yiG8KBXVZiz?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [Browserless world post nearly ready; aiming to publish in 1-2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/T3EBgMGKBvQAu9jWamjm-yiG8KBXVZiz?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - [Team to repost recent content with tweaks on Tue @ 9am ET; seek expert advice if performance doesn't improve](https://fathom.video/share/T3EBgMGKBvQAu9jWamjm-yiG8KBXVZiz?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)

## Topics

### LinkedIn Post Performance Analysis

  - [Recent "Effective Craziness" post significantly underperformed vs previous post](https://fathom.video/share/T3EBgMGKBvQAu9jWamjm-yiG8KBXVZiz?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Posted Thu 10am ET vs previous Tue 9am ET](https://fathom.video/share/T3EBgMGKBvQAu9jWamjm-yiG8KBXVZiz?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
  - [33 reactions, 2k views (described as "peanuts")](https://fathom.video/share/T3EBgMGKBvQAu9jWamjm-yiG8KBXVZiz?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [Substack subscribers dropped (uncommon occurrence)](https://fathom.video/share/T3EBgMGKBvQAu9jWamjm-yiG8KBXVZiz?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Potential factors: posting time, day, image use, content style (less provocative)](https://fathom.video/share/T3EBgMGKBvQAu9jWamjm-yiG8KBXVZiz?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)

### LinkedIn Optimization Strategy

  - [Plan to repost content with tweaks:](https://fathom.video/share/T3EBgMGKBvQAu9jWamjm-yiG8KBXVZiz?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [Remove large image for more visible text](https://fathom.video/share/T3EBgMGKBvQAu9jWamjm-yiG8KBXVZiz?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
      - [Slightly more provocative tone (without going overboard)](https://fathom.video/share/T3EBgMGKBvQAu9jWamjm-yiG8KBXVZiz?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [Post Tue 9am ET (matching previous successful post timing)](https://fathom.video/share/T3EBgMGKBvQAu9jWamjm-yiG8KBXVZiz?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
  - [If performance doesn't improve, team will seek expert advice:](https://fathom.video/share/T3EBgMGKBvQAu9jWamjm-yiG8KBXVZiz?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)
      - [Megan to consult LinkedIn optimization specialist](https://fathom.video/share/T3EBgMGKBvQAu9jWamjm-yiG8KBXVZiz?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)
      - [Guillaume to reach out to LinkedIn's head of growth](https://fathom.video/share/T3EBgMGKBvQAu9jWamjm-yiG8KBXVZiz?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)
